word: H1833 - דְּמֶשֶׁק - dᵉmesheq - dem-eh'-shek - In Damascus

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּמשׁק

Transliteration: demesheq

Phonetic: dem-eh'-shek

BDB Definition:

  1. damask?, silk? (meaning uncertain)

Origin: by orthographical variation from H1834

TWOT entry: 433?

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
